allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const html = fs.readFileSync\('hifi.html', 'utf8'\); const scriptMatch = html.match\(/<script[^>]*>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/g\); if\(scriptMatch\) { scriptMatch.forEach\(\(s, i\) => { const code = s.replace\(/<\\/?script[^>]*>/g, ''\); try { new Function\(code\); console.log\('Script block', i+1, ': OK'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('Script block', i+1, ': ERROR -', e.message\); } }\); }")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const html = fs.readFileSync\('hifi.html', 'utf8'\); const scriptMatch = html.match\(/<script[^>]*>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/gi\); if\(scriptMatch\) { scriptMatch.forEach\(\(s,i\) => { const code = s.replace\(/<\\/?script[^>]*>/gi, ''\); try { new Function\(code\); console.log\('Script', i+1, 'OK'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('Script', i+1, 'ERROR:', e.message\); }}\);}")
